lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are flawless with no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body have no scratches or dents. The interior is in original condition with no visible wear or staining. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.
The car is in poor condition.

This vehicle is in good condition, reflecting consistent care and regular maintenance. The exterior remains in great shape with only minor signs of wear, such as small stone chips and faint surface scratches consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is clean, well-kept, and all primary features are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is reliable and performs smoothly on the road, offering a dependable driving experience for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The exterior has sustained significant damage, including multiple large dents, peeling clear coat, and advancing rust on the quarter panels and door sills. Mechanically, the car is barely drivable; the engine has a loud knock, the transmission slips significantly, and the brakes are unresponsive. Inside, the interior is in rough shape with torn seats, a cracked dashboard, and non-functional electronics. This car will require a trailer for transport and is recommended only for those with the tools and time for a complete overhaul.

Calling all project lovers and DIY enthusiasts! This vehicle is ready for a complete transformation. While it currently requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it offers a fantastic opportunity for someone looking for a budget-friendly project or a source for quality parts. It’s a diamond in the rough waiting for the right hands to bring it back to life!

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, the automobile remains in commendable condition, offering a refined driving experience. With its sophisticated profile and proven reliability, it stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for all your road trips and daily commutes. It's super reliable and honestly just a fun drive! I’ve taken great care of it, so you’re getting a fantastic car that’s ready to hit the road today. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and optimized Double VANOS variable valve timing. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for superior corner-exit traction. This example maintains excellent chassis rigidity with documented subframe reinforcement. Recent service includes a precise valve adjustment and a comprehensive cooling system overhaul, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates within peak tolerances. The suspension remains taut with refreshed bushings, offering the communicative feedback and balanced weight distribution this platform is renowned for. A driver-focused machine mechanically sorted for the spirited enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. No mechanical issues. Title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable, high-performing daily driver. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor road wear consistent with careful use, while the interior remains smoke-free, crisp, and professionally detailed. Mechanically, the car is in strong health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has received all scheduled oil changes and preventative services on time. The tires have significant tread remaining, the brakes are firm, and every electronic feature—from the infotainment system to the climate control—functions perfectly. It offers a quiet, confident ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership. A solid choice for anyone seeking a dependable vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

This meticulously maintained vehicle presents a compelling opportunity for the discerning motorist. Characterized by its mechanical integrity and preserved aesthetic, the automobile has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure continued performance and reliability. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, balancing refined engineering with exceptional value, making it an ideal acquisition for those who prioritize both quality and longevity.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained example of automotive excellence. This vehicle balances superior mechanical integrity with a sophisticated presentation, ensuring a reliable and premium driving experience. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a standard of care that distinguishes it within the pre-owned market, offering the discerning buyer an ideal combination of performance and value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It’s definitely ready to hit the road with a new owner who will appreciate it as much as I have! Everything runs smoothly, and it’s been well-maintained over the years. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,000 RPM redline via individual throttle bodies. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory-spec variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural rigidity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its factory-tuned balance between damping and rebound, while the cross-drilled rotors offer consistent thermal management. A mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving naturally aspirated era, perfect for the driver who values tactile feedback and chassis poise.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking a reliable, well-maintained car that balances performance with everyday comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor road wear typical of a carefully driven vehicle. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium seating shows very light use, and all interior electronics—including the navigation system and premium audio—are fully operational. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from a rigorous, documented maintenance schedule. It recently received a full service, including fresh fluids and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it is ready for the road immediately. With its blend of refined handling and a quiet, composed ride, this car offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, characterized by its rigorous maintenance history and exceptional mechanical integrity. This selection offers a refined driving experience, blending sophisticated engineering with a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking reliable performance and executive presence.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits consistent performance and aesthetic integrity, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for reliability and mechanical excellence. A distinguished choice for those seeking exceptional value and long-term dependability without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super well-maintained—perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks and feels fantastic on the road. It runs like a dream and is ready for its next big adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!
This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example featuring the legendary S54 inline-six engine, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and linear power delivery
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. All service records available. Runs smoothly.

This meticulously maintained sedan strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather upholstery that shows minimal aging and a full suite of functioning electronics, including a premium sound system and dual-zone climate control. Mechanically, this vehicle is sound; it has been serviced at regular intervals, with a recently documented oil change and brake inspection. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a confident and quiet driving experience. Equipped with original alloy wheels and tires that have significant tread life remaining, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete peace of mind.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity for the sophisticated buyer, this vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it remains in commendable condition, offering a seamless blend of performance and reliability. This is a distinguished choice for those who demand excellence without compromise.

This expertly curated vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the sophisticated buyer. Exhibiting consistent maintenance and reliable performance, it has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity. A distinguished choice that balances refined aesthetics with proven durability.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s looking for a great new home. This car has been super reliable and is still in wonderful shape, perfect for daily commutes or weekend road trips. It’s been well-cared for and drives like a dream—honestly, it’s a total joy to be behind the wheel! Come take it for a spin; I know you’ll love it as much as I have!

Offering a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This driver’s example utilizes a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. The chassis is structurally sound with documented rear subframe reinforcement and recent valve clearance adjustments. Featuring a taut suspension geometry and responsive rack-and-pinion steering, this M3 provides an authentic analog driving experience. While displaying minor cosmetic wear consistent with its age, the drivetrain remains robust and performance-ready.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance. Reliable. $34,500.

This exceptionally well-maintained vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer. The exterior finish remains vibrant and glossy, showing only the lightest signs of careful road use, while the interior is remarkably clean, odor-free, and features supple seating surfaces. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced punctually according to manufacturer recommendations. All safety features, technology interfaces, and climate controls are fully operational. This car delivers a reliable and comfortable driving experience, reflecting the pride of ownership it has received throughout its life. It is a solid, dependable choice for those seeking quality without the premium of a brand-new model.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. A sophisticated choice for those seeking a balance of luxury and proven longevity.
